executionArgs.additionalInstruction: Regenerate tests strictly from testsprite_tests/testsprite_backend_test_plan.json. Hard rules: (1) /api/upload create assertions MUST use 201 and response shape { file: ... }; never assert 200 for successful create. (2) On localhost:3000 chunked flow MUST use only /api/upload/init, /api/upload/chunk, /api/upload/complete; NEVER use /chunked-upload/* on port 3000. (3) For /api/upload/chunk multipart fields MUST include chunk + uploadId + chunkIndex. (4) /api/upload/complete body MUST use uploadId and return assertion MUST be 201 with { file: { id, telegram_file_id, size_bytes } }. (5) /api/files guest listing MUST pass guest_session_id query and assert { files: [...] }. (6) /file public tests MUST use token=base64url(UUID bytes) and treat valid-token behavior as redirect or range 206 according to case. (7) PATCH /api/files assertions MUST read response shape { file: ... }.
